title: FICAN Conference 2024: Charting Nigeria’s Path to a $1 Trillion Economy - FinancialEDGE
description: Shedding light on Nigeria's path to achieving a $1 trillion economy, in an execlusive conversation with the editorial team of Financial Edge, Chima Titus Nwokwoji, National Chairman of Finance Correspondents Association of Nigeria (FICAN) / Assistant Business Editor of Nigeria Tribune Newspaper, shared his thoughts ahead of the highly anticipated 2024 FICAN Annual Conference in Lagos.
html: Shedding light on Nigeria’s path to achieving a $1 trillion economy, in an execlusive conversation with the editorial team of Financial Edge, Chima Titus Nwokwoji, National Chairman of Finance Correspondents Association of Nigeria (FICAN) / Assistant Business Editor of Nigeria Tribune Newspaper, shared his thoughts ahead of the highly anticipated 2024 FICAN Annual Conference in Lagos.
